ddls:
CREATE TABLE "route_data" (
  "route_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the migration data record */,
  "country_num" INTEGER /* Country number */,
  "state_num" INTEGER /* State number */,
  "route" INTEGER /* Route identifier */,
  "rp_id" INTEGER /* Route pattern identifier */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the migration data */,
  "aou" INTEGER /* Age/Origin/Unknown identifier */,
  "count_10" INTEGER /* Count of birds in the 10-19 age group */,
  "count_20" INTEGER /* Count of birds in the 20-29 age group */,
  "count_30" INTEGER /* Count of birds in the 30-39 age group */,
  "count_40" INTEGER /* Count of birds in the 40-49 age group */,
  "count_50" INTEGER /* Count of birds in the 50+ age group */,
  "stop_total" INTEGER /* Total number of stopovers */,
  "species_total" INTEGER /* Total number of species observed */,
  "species_id" TEXT /* Reference to the species observed */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the observed birds */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* More detailed age group */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the migration */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Type of habitat observed */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_data_rp_id FOREIGN KEY ("rp_id") REFERENCES route_patterns ("rp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_data_country_num FOREIGN KEY ("country_num") REFERENCES countries ("country_num"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_data_route FOREIGN KEY ("route") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_data_state_num FOREIGN KEY ("state_num") REFERENCES states ("state_num"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_data_aou FOREIGN KEY ("aou") REFERENCES age_origin_unknown ("aou_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_num" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_num" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_num" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the state belongs to */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-2 state code */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographical latitude */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographical longitude */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the migration route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the migration route */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the route */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the route */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Total distance of the route in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_patterns" (
  "rp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route pattern */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route the pattern belongs to */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the route pattern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route pattern */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the pattern */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the pattern */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year in which migration data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_origin_unknown" (
  "aou_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for age/origin/unknown */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age/origin/unknown category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aou_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the bird species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bird species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Preferred habitat of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stopover location */,
  "route_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the migration data record */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stopover */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stopover */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographical latitude of the stopover */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographical longitude of the stopover */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the stopover */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the stopover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stopover location */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observed species */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of observed birds */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the observation */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat during the observation */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the observer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the observer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the observer */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "institute" TEXT /* Institute or organization the observer is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "route_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the migration data record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent details of the access device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_route_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_data_id") REFERENCES route_data ("route_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
